'A digital interface with teal headers and green accents, displaying "success" and a score of "80/100," will be rendered in the thick, swirling brushstrokes and vibrant color palette characteristic of Vincent van Gogh\'s post-impressionist style. The text will maintain legibility while adopting the textured appearance of oil paint.'



{'type': 'image_url', 'image_url': {'url': 'data:image/png;base64,'}}
